title: Lankeshwar Temple
tagline: Lankeshwar Temple — spiritual town of Assam

overview.short: Lankeshwar Temple (Assamese: লংকেশ্বৰ দেৱালয়) is an ancient temple dedicated to Shiva on top of a hill in the western part of Guwahati, Assam, India, near the campus of Gauhati Un
overview.description: Lankeshwar Temple (Assamese: লংকেশ্বৰ দেৱালয়) is an ancient temple dedicated to Shiva on top of a hill in the western part of Guwahati, Assam, India, near the campus of Gauhati University. Lankeshwar is one of the many forms of Lord Shiva. The followers of Lord Shiva considered the temple as one of the most sacred one. Devotees all around the year visit this temple and seek divine blessings.

topPlaces.name: Rangmahal
topPlaces.description: Rangmahal is a village in North Guwahati, Kamrup rural district, situated in north bank of river Brahmaputra.

topPlaces.name: Saraighat
topPlaces.description: Saraighat (Assamese pronunciation: [xɔ.ɹaɪ.ɡʰat]) is a neighborhood in the Indian city of Guwahati, on the north bank of the river Brahmaputra. Sarai was a small village where the old abandoned N.F. Railway station of Amingaon was located.

topPlaces.name: Pandu Port
topPlaces.description: Pandu Port is a river port in the Indian state of Assam, serving Guwahati. This port has been developed on the bank of the Brahmaputra river.

topPlaces.name: Adabari
topPlaces.description: Adabari is a locality in Guwahati.

topPlaces.name: Pandu, Guwahati
topPlaces.description: Pandu is a locality in Guwahati, India. Its nearest airport is Guwahati Airport and nearest railway station is the Kamakhya station.

topPlaces.name: Amingaon
topPlaces.description: Amingaon (Assamese pronunciation: [ˈɑ:mɪnˌgɑ̃ʊ]) is a locality in North Guwahati, Assam and served as the district headquarters of Kamrup district.

topPlaces.name: Dharapur
topPlaces.description: Dharapur is a census town in Kamrup Metropolitan district in the state of Assam, India.

topPlaces.name: Atal Udyan
topPlaces.description: Atal Udyan (Assamese pronunciation: [ɔtɔl uˈdjan]) is an urban park situated at Adabari Tiniali in the Maligaon area of Guwahati, India.

items.note: Rangmahal is a village in North Guwahati, Kamrup rural district, situated in north bank of river Brahmaputra.

Saraighat (Assamese pronunciation: [xɔ.ɹaɪ.ɡʰat]) is a neighborhood in the Indian city of Guwahati, on the north bank of the river Brahmaputra. Sarai was a small village where the old abandoned N.F. Railway station of Amingaon was located.
Pandu Port is a river port in the Indian state of Assam, serving Guwahati. This port has been developed on the bank of the Brahmaputra river.
Adabari is a locality in Guwahati.
Pandu is a locality in Guwahati, India. Its nearest airport is Guwahati Airport and nearest railway station is the Kamakhya station.
Amingaon (Assamese pronunciation: [ˈɑ:mɪnˌgɑ̃ʊ]) is a locality in North Guwahati, Assam and served as the district headquarters of Kamrup district.
Dharapur is a census town in Kamrup Metropolitan district in the state of Assam, India.
Atal Udyan (Assamese pronunciation: [ɔtɔl uˈdjan]) is an urban park situated at Adabari Tiniali in the Maligaon area of Guwahati, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lankeshwar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lankeshwar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lankeshwar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport, Guwahati (9 km) and the nearest railway station is Guwahati Railway Station (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lankeshwar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lankeshwar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lankeshwar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Lankeshwar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lankeshwar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Rangmahal, Saraighat, Pandu Port, Adabari, Pandu, Guwahati.
